---
name: prj-update
description: "Use when updating task progress, task start/complete, commit metadata, or project status. Trigger words: progress update, prj-update, task complete/start."
---

# prj-update

## Purpose
Update project workflow status records.

## Commands
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/prj-update status
./commands/prj-update task-start <TASK_ID>
./commands/prj-update task-complete <TASK_ID>
./commands/prj-update commit
```
